Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Zhenshicheng Auto Parts Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Zhenshicheng Auto Parts Co., Ltd. is a highly representative 'universal auto parts market proxy' that was absurdly elevated by the official system to a 'major complete automobile manufacturing plant.' The official commercial system, merely because its name contains 'auto parts,' extremely hastily and blindly categorized it into the highest echelon of the industrial world: 'Automobile Manufacturing - Complete Auto Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is a micro-enterprise established in 2010, with a nominal capital of 10.09 million (3.51 million paid-in), and its 2024 insured headcount is only '6 people'! The most fatal coup de grâce comes from its registered coordinates: 'Sci-Tech R&D Base, Maigaoqiao Pioneer Park, Qixia District, Nanjing City (No. 18 Yinchun Road - K454).' An address like 'K454' with a letter and number code in an industrial park usually implies it is just an extremely small subdivided office unit or a virtual registration affiliation point. In this micro-unit, relying on 6 employees to establish a modern complete auto production line featuring stamping, welding, painting, and final assembly workshops? This not only violates physical common sense; it is a humorous deconstruction of the human industrial system. Reviewing its true business license, which resembles an inventory list for a grocery market: from 'auto parts, tires, lubricating oil' all the way to selling 'daily necessities, labor protection supplies, sporting goods, even steel and tarpaulins.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a complete auto manufacturing plant; this is a pure Six-Person Universal Auto Parts & Hardware Trading Shell hidden in a micro-unit of an industrial park. The owner (Guo Qing) most likely started with an auto parts business and now uses this shell to sell everything, from delivering oil and tires to repair shops to delivering steel and tarpaulins to construction sites, acting as an all-encompassing trade middleman.
